resultList.dtldesc: Own a stylish and thoughtfully planned 2 BHK flat in the vibrant neighbourhood of Taloja Phase 2, Navi Mumbai. Schools, hospitals, malls, and supermarkets are all located within 1 km of the project. Public transport options, banks, and ATMs are also easily accessible. The property is only 1 km from the Taloja railway station, further enhancing its connectivity.::::::
